title: Tons Of Dimensions
description: This mod adds dimensions from most blocks in minecraft.
body:
This mod adds dimensions, for example, if there is a Diamond Block in Minecraft, (which there is, im just using it for an example), then there is a Diamond Block Dimension, i will try to be adding every single block dimension into the game, also some custom ones will be made in the future ;) 
What this mod adds: Dimensions which adds every type of block, into a Dimension.
How this will affect your playing experience: it will allow you to travel through all types of dimensions!
What this adds: it adds new igniters so you can ignite the portals, for example, a diamond block dimension portal will need a diamond block dimension igniter.
